disclaimer:
────────────────────────────────────────


URecruit Global is a talent intelligence and recruitment technology company, so our outreach is powered by large scale systems as well as specialist recruiters. To ensure reliable delivery, we operate multiple domains—urecruitglobal.work, urecruitglobal.site, urecruitglobal.org, urecruit-global.com, urecruitglobal.net, urecruitglobal.online—and our primary site urecruitglobal.com; all domains redirect to urecruitglobal.com. If you have any authenticity concerns, please copy info@urecruitglobal.com and/or our managing directors colin@urecruitglobal.com and paul@urecruitglobal.com into your reply. Some team members do not maintain LinkedIn profiles and may refer you to colleagues who do for ongoing communication.

usage.description: Email signatures for URecruit accounts. Must match frontend EmailComposer system exactly.
usage.important: The drafter skill must append signature + disclaimer to every email body before sending to send-gmail-message edge function.
